evidence: "I love the English mysteries. I have watched these several times."
"I love Agatha Christie mysteries no matter who the start is. They are always fun, full of intrigue and bad people who get by for a while and then cleverly caught."
"The mysteries aren't easy to figure out."
"The plots are complicated but are always saved."
"Covert Affairs keeps your interest and is fast paced."
"It is exciting action and amusing at the same time."
"The actors fit their roles and each adds a lot to the relationships and the story."
"The writing and movie is quite intriguing."

brand_loyalty.value: high for Agatha Christie and Denzel Washington
evidence: "I am a fan of Agatha Christie mysteries."
"The cast seems real, not just acting."
"It is scary, love story, comedy, good analogy of the different crimes."
"I was watching it on TV, had to go do something else. Upset I missed the end, so I went on Amazon and bought it so I could watch it to the end."

summary: The user has a strong preference for mystery genres, particularly those involving Agatha Christie stories. They enjoy complex narratives with fast pacing and high production quality, often expressing emotional engagement with the content.
